column3: (Secure Pages Include Mixed Content - not applicable to JSON API)
(Cookie Without Secure Flag - API only uses Bearer tokens not cookies)
(Incomplete or No Cache-control Header - API responses, not HTML pages)
(Web Browser XSS Protection Not Enabled - JSON API)
(Cross-Domain JavaScript Source File Inclusion - JSON API)
(X-Frame-Options Header Not Set - JSON API, not served in iframes)
(X-Content-Type-Options Header Missing - set via Helmet in NestJS)
(Timestamp Disclosure - ISO 8601 timestamps are not a security risk)
(Session Management Response Identified - JWT Bearer, not session cookies)
(Sub Resource Integrity Attribute Missing - JSON API)
